status: SOURCE OF TRUTH — do not modify without user decision.

source.name: Tome of Knowledge — Scholar's Archive
source.derivedFrom: Stitch project projects/12348650992582553962, refined from the landing screen a9e3967d

layout.notes: All reading-view pages (/contents, /entry, /scribe) use contentWrapper. Only the landing page may use marketingWrapper for its hero/bento sections. Sub-footer on the landing page intentionally opts out of any wrapper and spans full page width with px-12.

utilityClasses.no-scrollbar: Hides scrollbars on a scrollable container.
utilityClasses.parchment-mask: Masks the bottom of an element with a linear fade.
utilityClasses.parchment-texture: Soft radial-wash overlay for main content regions.
utilityClasses.parchment-glow: Warm amber box-shadow glow for editor/canvas cards.
utilityClasses.drop-cap: Illuminated drop cap on the first letter, 4.5rem, amber-600.
utilityClasses.leader-dots: Inline dotted leader row used in ledger lists.

components.AppShell: app/components/AppShell.tsx — wraps every page with SideNavBar + TopAppBar + main + decorative corner.
components.SideNavBar: app/components/SideNavBar.tsx — w-72 sticky sidebar; takes active: NavKey prop.
components.TopAppBar: app/components/TopAppBar.tsx — sticky bar with two flex groups: LEFT = brand <Link href='/'> + Characters/Homebrew nav; RIGHT = search + account glyph. Brand MUST be a link to '/'.
components.Button: app/components/Button.tsx — variants primary | secondary | ghost, sizes sm | md, optional icon.
components.SectionHeading: app/components/SectionHeading.tsx — h2 with gradient rule + actions slot.
